subcodes.first_line: O Friend! We have, in times past, sent unto thee Tablets wherein lieth that which would suffice all the peoples of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حبیب انا ارسلنا الیک من قبل الواحا و فیها ما یغنی العالمین جمیعا و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the power of words; of speech
